title: Solvent Extraction Studies on Thiocyanate Complexes of Zinc(II), Cadmium(II) and Mercury(II)
author: DEVENDRA SINGH
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, University of Roorkee, Roorkee-247 667 

 The extraction behaviour or zinc(ll), cadmium(lI) and mercury(ll) thiocyanate complexes has been studied in some oxygenated solvents, high molecular weight amiues, tributyl phosphate and pyridine. The effect of different variables on extraction has been investigated. The extracting species have been identified using loading ratio data and by the method of slope analysis. On the basis of extraction data some mutual separations and separations from other commonly associated elements have been carried out. Relative merits and limitations of different extraction systems are discussed.
